prompt: Outfit: a feminine white summer Y2K outfit featuring a fitted white eyelet lace bustier-style mini dress with a soft sweetheart neckline, delicate all-over cutwork embroidery, lightly structured bodice shaping, side ruched drawstring details, small ribbon-tie accents, and a softly flared mini skirt hem, with premium fabric texture, realistic garment construction, clean stitching, natural seam tension, believable lightweight cotton lace weight, subtle wrinkles, realistic drape, refined edge finishing, visible seams, real folds, well-made clothing details, high-quality material feel, and detailed garment realism; paired with white knee-high lace socks with subtle floral openwork texture and black chunky platform loafer-style shoes with leather-like material, clean stitching, metal-free minimal finishing, layered rubber sole construction, and realistic footwear materials; finished with a small ivory-to-cream rounded mini shoulder bag with a simple short strap and clean leather-like body; add a random mix of delicate feminine accessories in pearl-tone, silver-tone, or soft romantic Y2K style that naturally match the outfit; not costume-like, not cheap-looking.
